allow: Bash(bun -e "import\('./src/fixtures/sample-galaxy.ts'\).then\(m => console.log\('fixture ok, id=', m.sampleGalaxy.meta.id, 'bodies=', m.sampleGalaxy.spatial?.bodies.length\)\).catch\(e => { console.error\('FIXTURE FAILED', e\); process.exit\(1\); }\)")

Bash(bun -e "const {Database}=require\('bun:sqlite'\);const db=new Database\('scholarsystem.db'\);const row=db.prepare\('SELECT data FROM galaxies ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1'\).get\(\);const g=JSON.parse\(row.data\);console.log\('id:',g.meta.id\);console.log\('title:',g.meta.title\);console.log\('source excerpt:',g.source.excerpt.slice\(0,200\)\);console.log\('\\\\n=== knowledge ==='\);console.log\('knowledge.title:',g.knowledge?.title\);console.log\('knowledge.summary:',g.knowledge?.summary\);console.log\('\\\\ntopics:'\);for\(const t of g.knowledge?.topics||[]\)console.log\(' -',t.id,'::',t.title,'::',t.summary\);console.log\('\\\\nsubtopics:'\);for\(const s of g.knowledge?.subtopics||[]\)console.log\(' -',s.id,'::',s.title,'::',s.summary,'=> concepts:',s.conceptIds\);console.log\('\\\\nconcepts:'\);for\(const c of g.knowledge?.concepts||[]\)console.log\(' -',c.id,'['+c.kind+'/'+c.modelTier+']',c.title,'::',c.brief\);console.log\('\\\\nloose:',g.knowledge?.looseConceptIds\);console.log\('\\\\nrelationships:'\);for\(const r of g.relationships||[]\)console.log\(' -',r.from,'->',r.to,'\('+r.kind+'\)'\);")
Bash(bun -e "import { renderPageAsImage, getDocumentProxy } from 'unpdf'; console.log\('unpdf works:', typeof renderPageAsImage\)")
Bash(bun -e "import { extractPdf } from './src/pipeline/parsing/extract/pdf'; console.log\('pdf extractor loads:', typeof extractPdf\)")
